FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Struct InteractionAnim

Namespace
FluentGpu.Scene
Assembly
FluentGpu.Scene.dll

Eased interaction progress for a node (sparse side-table, O(interacted nodes)). The InteractionAnimator eases HoverT/PressT toward their targets on pointer enter/leave/press; the recorder lerps Fill/Border with them for the WinUI ~83ms brush transition (instead of the instant flag switch).

public struct InteractionAnim

InteractionAnim
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
